meaning: adj.部分的,局部的,偏袒的,偏爱的n.泛音
examples: I might be accused of being partial.
He's partial to sporty women with blue eyes.
It was only a partial solution to the problem.
The Romans, who later controlled this region, were also partial to a drop of wine.
Here are seven companies (the last defunct) and partial descriptions of their product lines.
